# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "appName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Globally unique name for the Web App."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-plan')]"
    },
    "appServicePlanSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S1",
      "allowedValues": [
        "F1",
        "B1",
        "B2",
        "B3",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "S3",
        "P1v3",
        "P2v3",
        "P3v3"
      ]
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-sql')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL logical server name (must be globally unique)."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-db')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S0",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "S3",
        "GP_S_Gen5_1",
        "GP_S_Gen5_2",
        "GP_S_Gen5_4",
        "GP_S_Gen5_8"
      ]
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Storage account name (3-24 lowercase letters and numbers)."
      }
    },
    "storageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "sqlDatabaseApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "webApiVersion": "2022-03-01",
    "storageApiVersion": "2023-01-01",
    "appInsightsNotIncluded": true,
    "sqlConnectionStringName": "DefaultConnection",
    "storageConnectionStringName": "StorageConnection",
    "storageBlobEndpointSuffix": "[environment().suffixes.storage]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('storageSku')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('webApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]",
        "tier": "[if(or(startsWith(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'P'), startsWith(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'EP')), 'Premium', if(startsWith(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'S'), 'Standard', if(startsWith(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'B'), 'Basic', 'Free')))]",
        "size": "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]",
        "capacity": 1
      },
      "properties": {
        "reserved": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlServerApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlServerApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlDatabaseApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSkuName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('webApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "alwaysOn": "[not(equals(parameters('appServicePlanSku'), 'F1'))]",
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "1"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_HTTPLOGGING_RETENTION_DAYS",
              "value": "7"
            }
          ],
          "connectionStrings": [
            {
              "name": "[variables('sqlConnectionStringName')]",
              "type": "SQLAzure",
              "connectionString": "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), variables('sqlServerApiVersion')).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
            },
            {
              "name": "[variables('storageConnectionStringName')]",
              "type": "Custom",
              "connectionString": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageApiVersion')).keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', variables('storageBlobEndpointSuffix'), ';')]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "webAppUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('https://', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('webApiVersion')).defaultHostName)]"
    },
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), variables('sqlServerApiVersion')).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    }
  }
}
